title: Dynamic Atoms
description: Runtime-determined parsing via callbacks. Enable context-sensitive parsing where the grammar itself depends on input or previously captured values.

motivation.why: Dynamic atoms allow parsing behavior to change based on context. This enables scenarios impossible with static grammars.
useCases: Configuration-driven parsing with different grammars per config
Context-sensitive keywords that change meaning based on position
Incremental parsing with hints from previous parses
Plugin systems where users inject custom parsers

inputFormat.description: Any input where parsing behavior depends on context.
inputFormat.syntax: ruby def method... / python lambda x: ...

outputFormat.description: Atoms determined at runtime by callback.

callback_result.description: Atom returned by callback determines parsing
